actions.name: log_and_flag
actions.description: Log the anomalous flow and flag for security analyst review.

actions.name: snapshot_vm_state
actions.description: Trigger an automated virtual machine snapshot of the target asset for forensics.

actions.name: rate_limit_ip
actions.description: Rate-limit the offending source IP address at the firewall.

actions.name: revoke_session
actions.description: Revoke active authentication sessions for user-associated anomalies.

actions.name: isolate_endpoint
actions.description: Isolate the infected endpoint or VM from the network.
